name: Invoke Bedrock Model for Resource Exhaustion
description: Simulates an attacker invoking Amazon Bedrock foundation models in a loop to exhaust quota and generate unexpected costs — analogous to cryptomining but targeting LLM inference billing.
prerequisites: None — requires bedrock:InvokeModel permission and Bedrock model access enabled in the account/region
detection_signal: bedrock:InvokeModel called at high volume or from an unexpected principal; sudden spike in Bedrock spend in cost explorer
